results.rendered_html:
akṣāra a. [nāsti kṣāraṃ yatra] Free from artificial salt.
— raḥ Natural salt gokṣīraṃgoghṛtaṃcaivadhānyamudgāstilāyavāḥ . sāmudrasaiṃdhavaṃcaiva ˚lavaṇaṃsmṛtam ..
Comp.
— lavaṇaṃ
— (rā˚) [kṣāreṇa ūṣaramṛttikayā nirvṛttaṃaṇ kṣāraṃ kṛtrimaṃ lavaṇaṃ; na. ta.] natural salt; munyannāni payaḥ somo māṃsaṃ yaccānupaskṛtam . akṣāralavaṇaṃ caiva prakṛtyā havirucyate ..  Ms. 3. 257  (akṛtrimalavaṇaṃ saiṃdhavādi); ˚ṇānnāḥ syuḥ 5. 73 ; caturthakālamaśnīyādakṣāralavaṇaṃ mitaṃ 11. 110 ; sometimes used for food that may be eaten at times unfit for the performance of religious duties; a class of objects such as cow's milk, ghee, rice, &c.
